prompt: Time for a release. I know some PRs touched the CRD definitions, so make sure the ngrok-crds chart gets updated too. Prepare everything.
assertions: container-changelog.md exists and starts with '## X.Y.Z' where X.Y.Z is a valid semver version
container-changelog.md contains a '**Full Changelog**' link using the ngrok-operator- tag prefix
container-changelog.md uses Keep-a-Changelog sections (### Added, ### Changed, ### Fixed, etc.) with no empty sections
container-changelog.md entries have correct attribution format: 'by @author in [#NNN](https://github.com/ngrok/ngrok-operator/pull/NNN)'
container-changelog.md includes PR #799 (CloudEndpoint IsNotFound handling) and PR #803 (misc quick wins) since these are new for container
container-changelog.md does NOT include PR #781 or PR #777 since these have new_for:[] (already released)
helm-changelog.md exists and starts with version metadata lines ('- Update ngrok-operator image version to')
crds-changelog.md exists and includes all 4 CRD PRs (#772, #779, #792, #803)
crds-changelog.md mentions the CRDs version bump and uses the helm-chart-ngrok-crds- tag prefix in Full Changelog link
versions.json exists and includes a helm_crds version bump (from 0.2.1 to something higher)
